meta.title: GeoGuide — Audio Guide for Georgia's Museums
meta.description: Professional audio guides for Vardzia, Uplistsikhe, Akhaltsikhe, Svetitskhoveli and more. 10-15 GEL per museum. Available in multiple languages.

hero.h1: Explore Georgia at your own pace
hero.subtitle: Professional audio guides for Georgia's most iconic landmarks. Available in {count} languages, at your price.

what_is.title: What is GeoGuide?
what_is.p1: GeoGuide is an audio guide app for Georgia's most popular museums and historical landmarks. Listen to professionally narrated stories about each exhibit at your own pace, in your own language.
what_is.p2: We cover Georgia's most visited sites — Vardzia cave monastery, Rabati Fortress, Uplistsikhe ancient city, Svetitskhoveli Cathedral, Enguri Dam and the main museums of Tbilisi.

steps.title: Open the app
steps.description: Download from App Store, or use our web app directly in your browser — no install needed.

steps.title: Buy a code
steps.description: Pay online here, or buy an activation code at the museum ticket booth. 10-15 GEL.

steps.title: Listen & explore
steps.description: Activate the code, choose your language, and walk at your own pace. Works offline.

museums.title: Museums available in English
museums.empty: No museums available in this language yet. Check back soon!

callout.title: Why audio guide instead of a tour guide?
callout.text: A private guide in Georgia costs 100-150 GEL. GeoGuide costs 10-15 GEL. Same professional quality, your own language, your own pace. Pause when you want, rewind when you missed something.

items.q: Do I need internet to use GeoGuide?
items.a: You need internet to download the app and the tour content. Once the tour is downloaded, it works completely offline. Important: download the tour at your hotel or home before visiting — mobile signal can be weak at Vardzia, Uplistsikhe and other remote sites.
It depends on the museum. Vardzia has 8 languages. Rabati Fortress has 4. Most Tbilisi museums have 3. Check each museum card above for details.

items.q: Can I buy the code in advance?
items.a: Yes. Purchase online with any credit card, or buy at the museum ticket booth on arrival.

items.q: Do I need to install an app?
items.a: Two options: download GeoGuide from the App Store (iOS, Android coming soon), or use our web app (PWA) directly in your browser — no install.

items.q: Is there a rental audio device at the museum?
items.a: Yes, at Vardzia, Akhaltsikhe, Uplistsikhe, Georgian National Museum and Art Museum you can rent a physical audio device at the ticket desk. A photo ID is required as a deposit (passport, ID card or driving license).

items.q: How long does the tour take?
items.a: 45-90 minutes per museum, depending on the size. You can pause, rewind, or skip at any time.

final_cta.title: Ready to explore?
final_cta.description: Choose a museum and start your journey.
